since_last: 61% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.80%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.94% · BTC -2.65% · Gold -2.15% · Nasdaq100 +1.94%. 61% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.80%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.80%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +10.62%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +10.62%, SMCI +8.35%, TLN +7.79%, SMR +7.54%, CEVA +7.48%. Laggards: INOD -7.74%, SPCX -7.03%, IBM -5.88%, MDB -4.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.03% at $178.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
